title: Unwritten doctrines
hook: Unwritten doctrines. Beyond the visible forms, what is the One?

sections.heading: Opening
sections.narration: Unwritten doctrines. Beyond the visible forms, what is the One?
sections.visualHint: Slow zoom on illuminated manuscript / symbolic stone — platonism color accent.

sections.heading: Context
sections.narration: In 2426 years ago, within the Platonism stream of spiritual history — at Human scale — a door opens.
sections.visualHint: Era card: 2426 years ago; tradition motif in platonism palette; subtle symbolic geometry.

sections.heading: The mystery
sections.narration: Ancient reports (especially from Aristotle and later Neoplatonists) suggest Plato reserved his deepest metaphysical teaching for inner-circle students.
sections.visualHint: Abstract esoteric imagery — platonism; textural, luminous, not literal.

sections.narration: Whether these "unwritten doctrines" existed as a systematic esoteric curriculum or as speculative reconstruction remains debated — but they became a foundation for Western esoteric Platonism for two millennia.
sections.visualHint: Abstract esoteric imagery — platonism; textural, luminous, not literal.

sections.heading: Parallel threads
sections.narration: This moment echoes elsewhere in material history: Plato's Academy.
sections.visualHint: Split-screen or cross-fade between linked topics; connection lines between titles.

sections.heading: Cosmos
sections.narration: Learn more from the sources cited in Cosmos. Zoom out to the universe. Zoom in to walk the stones. The hidden streams wait.
sections.visualHint: Cosmos wordmark; starfield fading to a single glowing stone; contemplative outro.

openMontage.cursorPrompt:
Using the OpenMontage Animated Explainer pipeline, produce a 60-second video from the attached Cosmos brief.

Requirements:
- Use Piper TTS for narration (free/local path unless I provide other API keys).
- Use Remotion image scenes with Ken Burns motion — contemplative pacing.
- Tone: contemplative. Style playbook: clean_professional.
- Accent color for titles and transitions: #e8e0d0.
- Follow the 6 sections in the brief (hook → context → core → links → close).
- Honor onScreenText and visualHint fields for each section.
